showcase.description: One place to manually QA every Nova-like admin-v2 feature family against deterministic data and explicit route coverage.

flow.step_1: Reset the showcase to the baseline dataset.
flow.step_2: Verify the resource cards below all show the expected seeded counts.

flow.step_4: Use the bespoke tool links only for workflows that intentionally stay outside the generic framework.

non_demo.dashboard_description: The dashboard remains a composed operator surface. The playground links into it, but the dashboard itself is not a generic resource demo.
non_demo.settings_description: Settings stays a curated admin tool. Notification Recipients is the generic resource-backed slice to QA instead.
non_demo.support_description: Support uses a custom multi-pane operator workflow and intentionally does not collapse into a generic resource.
non_demo.users_description: The legacy users table still exists, but auth-managed parity is verified on Managed Users.

sections.no_dedicated_demo_desc: These surfaces are still important, but they stay bespoke or legacy by design.
